calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Appearances:
Amy E. Britt, Esq. for Plaintiff The Education resources Institute, Inc. Witness, Warren Moore was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Natalie R. Escoboza as follows:
Damages of $28,110.55
Attorney Fees $1,233.32
Interest of $6,727.51
Costs of $ 211.95
Total of $36,283.33
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Continued To Dec-12-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
